Genesis 30

Select a column header to see its column.

Dan and Naphtali

NoteLiterally bear children on my knees
NoteDan means He has judged or He has vindicated.
NoteNaphtali sounds like the Hebrew for wrestling.

Gad and Asher

NoteAlternate MT reading (see also LXX); the other alternate reads “A troop is coming!” NoteGad sounds like the Hebrew for good fortune, or alternately for band of raiders.
NoteAsher means happy.

Issachar, Zebulun, and Dinah

NoteIssachar sounds like the Hebrew for wages or reward.
NoteZebulun sounds like the Hebrew for honor.

Joseph

NoteJoseph means may He add.
